posts.author: nirkaru (nir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m subscribed to the PRO version with 20 participants.

I am having difficulty working with MONDAY due to the inability to align the text to the right in Conversation and in the main view.
you must work on a solution for text written RTL ???
